strong_decision.decision: Change the durable Playwright drive from a one-time snapshotted ordered target list to dynamic discovery plus a persisted completed-target set.
strong_decision.summary: Change the durable Playwright drive from a one-time snapshotted ordered target list to dynamic discovery plus a persisted completed-target set.

strong_decision.decision: Prefer deterministic snapshot rebuilds over mutable raw history rewrites.
strong_decision.summary: Prefer deterministic snapshot rebuilds over mutable raw history rewrites.
